title: Acquire + checksum pilot verified-open dataset(s); record provenance
context: M1 pilot acquisition. Only verified-open sources may be fetched; provenance and checksums are recorded at fetch time. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Acquire and checksum the pilot verified-open dataset(s) and record complete fetch provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Only verified-open sources fetched; SHA-256 recorded; no controlled/identifiable data present.
Scan for identifier-like fields passes (or the data is quarantined and excluded).
Provenance JSONL records source -> fetch -> checksum.
